channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lower road, 8th May
item.description:
Drain leaking sewage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging kerb & pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Tree overhanging kerb & pavement , requires cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No ramp since roundabout works, 8th May
item.description:
As has been previously reported the ramp from stonepark avenue to the sponge kitchen parade of shops was removed during the roundabout works and not reinstated. This means puschairs, wheelchairs and other disabled users have to walk along and cross at the junction of the main road and then make their way back to the shops through parked and potentially moving cars. This is extremely dangerous and an accident waiting to happen. When will the slope be reinstated? This forum previously advised January and it is now May.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chinese Roundabout, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Woolwich Road Victoria Way bus stop bins is overflowing, 8th May
item.description:
Hi there, Please empty this bin asap. It has not been changed since Wednesday and is badly overflow creating lots of mess around the bus stop. This is unacceptable. Sort this out asap Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 bags of rubbish dumped, 8th May
item.description:
Bags of rubbish left on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Paragon, Kidbrooke, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish left on side of the road, 8th May
item.description:
There is a rubbish bag left on the side of the road which has been here a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Grove, Kidbrooke

item.title: Spray paint on letterbox, 8th May
item.description:
Graffiti letterbox

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Fly tipping in front of 79 Charlton Road, 8th May
item.description:
Someone is continually leaving food fill household rubbish that is being scattered by foxes. Needs to be required to use household rubbish processing like everyone else.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broxbourne gardens grass overgrown, 8th May
item.description:
Grass across the whole garden is overgrown and needs cutting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Kilda Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bushes, 8th May
item.description:
Overhanging buses causing buses to move over and could cause damage to buses.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedges along public pathway adjacent to Broxbourne garden need cutting, 8th May
item.description:
Hedges along the public pavement going through broxbourne gardens (adjacent to 45) need cutting/pruning as they are grown over the public pathway causing hazard to people and pets.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broxbourne Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch obstructing road, 8th May
item.description:
The tree branch has fractured and fallen it now obstructs the road. It fell off today - 8 May 2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burford Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on TfL cabinet, 8th May
item.description:
White graffiti tag on a black TfL cabinet located on the pavement near the traffic lights. The cabinet is situated outside the Jewson Tool Hire at the junction of Renfrew Rd and Dugard Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Kennington Lane, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped waste, 8th May
item.description:
Waste food etc left on the pavements

item.title: Rubbish, 8th May
item.description:
Continued rubbish dump from vehicles
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spill, 8th May
item.description:
Looks like a paint spill on the road. I've seen paint trails elsewhere too but I think they will wear off in a short while but this may need attention. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herbert Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken manhole(?) cover, 8th May
item.description:
Metal cover in the pavement is cracked and noticeably bends under pressure when walked on. Worried it could give way entirely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homestall Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafiti on lampost, 8th May
item.description:
White pen graffiti on metal surface. The lampost it is found on has column number R56 13, should that assist

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th May
item.description:
Graffiti on two sides of the box. Postbox number 146D. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign facing wrong direction outside 48 Belvedere Road, 8th May
item.description:
A triangular road bend ahead sign is facing into the road rather than along it, lampost it is attached to has column number R56 13, should that assist

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
